log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Firbolg — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Firbolg — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Firbolg — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 15] HIT! 23 damage. Firbolg — Unarmored Caster HP: 44/67
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 15] HIT! 9 damage. Firbolg — Unarmored Caster HP: 35/67
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 15] HIT! 14 damage. Firbolg — Unarmored Caster HP: 21/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Firbolg — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 21/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Firbolg — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 21/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Firbolg — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 21/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 5 ══
--- Firbolg — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 21/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Firbolg — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Firbolg — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Firbolg — Unarmored Caster HP: 3/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 15] HIT! 24 damage. Firbolg — Unarmored Caster HP: -21/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 12] MAINTAINED!
